prompt:
Subject: Hydrangea garden near Kamakura wet with rain

Person/Expression: No people, flower scenery on a quiet rainy day, pale and fleeting atmosphere typical of the rainy season.

Clothing/Pose: Main subjects are hydrangeas in full bloom, pale blue-purple and light pink flower clusters, petals and wet leaves covered in raindrops, multiple hydrangeas softly overlapping in the foreground and background.

Background/Light: A garden along a slope filled with blooming hydrangeas near Kamakura, greenery hazy with rain, wet paths, streetlights glowing faintly in the distance, soft natural light from a cloudy sky, bluish atmosphere of the rainy season.

Composition/Camera: Low-angle close-up, right-aligned composition, high-definition depiction of only the main hydrangeas, 85mm macro lens, f1.4, extremely shallow depth of field, large circular bokeh, overlapping foreground and background bokeh.

Texture/Style: High-definition, 8K photo style, cinematic, pale film tone, cool blue color palette, soft light, delicate raindrops, transparent humidity expression, fantastic and poetic flower photography.

Negative: People, text, logo, watermark, strong presence of buildings, low quality, unnatural petals, excessive saturation, too hard outlines, noise, distorted bokeh.
